log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Dragonborn — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:19+3=22 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:17+-2=15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:14+-2=12 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 2/3 targets affected.
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Dragonborn — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:3+9=12 vs AC 14] MISS.
Frost Giant attacks Dragonborn — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:5+9=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 22 damage. Dragonborn — Bardic Musician HP: 45/67
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Dragonborn — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:16+3=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Dragonborn — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:16+9=25 vs AC 14] HIT! 31 damage. Dragonborn — Bardic Musician HP: 14/67
→ Dragonborn — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern! [CON save 13 vs DC 15]
Frost Giant attacks Dragonborn — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:11+9=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 30 damage. Dragonborn — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 2 rounds ===
